content: The selected rooms ({{count}}) will be permanently deleted. All data and and user access will be lost.

comment.text: This translation key provides the confirmation message displayed in a delete dialog, warning the user that selected rooms (and their data) will be permanently deleted. It includes the number of rooms being deleted (using `{{count}}`) and appears within a confirmation prompt before permanent deletion. Translators should ensure the message clearly conveys the irreversible nature of the action.
